title: The Problem Solvers | Anton Osika at Lovable
summary: Lovable is a platform that enables anyone to build software through conversation without requiring an engineering team. The product achieved millions of users within two months of launch. The platform is built using Claude and emphasizes trust as a competitive moat through craft and care.
